English: TYNWALD
ST. JOHN’S, 6th JULY, 1931
ABSTRACTS
OF
ACTS FOR PROMULGATION
Printed (by Authority) by Brown & Sons Limited, “Times” Buildings, Douglas.
1. — The Widow’s, Orphans’ and Old Age Contributory Pensions Amendment Act, 1931.
Manx: 1.— Yn Slattys Toyrtyn-Choonee Mraane Treoghe Treoghanyn as Shenn Eaysh (Lhiasaghey) Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane Jeig as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to amend the Widows’, Orphans’ and Old Age Contributory Pensions Act, 1929.
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lhiasaghey yn Slattys Toyrtyn-Choonee Mraane Treoghe Treoghanyn as Shenn Eaysh, Nuy cheead yeig nuy as feed.

English: 2.— The Arbitration (Foreign Awards) Act, 1931.
Manx: 2.— Yn Slattys Reaghys (Briwnyssyn Quaagh) Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane jeig as Feed.

English: The object of the Act is to give effect to an International Convention as to arbitrations.
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys shoh dy yannoo breeoil Coardail jeant eddyr Ashoonyn bentyn rish reaghys.

English: 3.— The pinfolds Transfer Act, 1931.
Manx: 3.— Yn Slattys Pundailyn Livrey-Harrish, Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane Jeig as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to transfer pinfolds to the parish commissioners.
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys shoh dy livrey harrish pundailyn gys ny Barrantee yn Skeerey.

English: 4.— The Partition Act, 1931.
Manx: 4.— Yn Slattys Rheynn-Halloo, Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane Jeig as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to divide or sell real estate held in undivided shares.
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys shoh dy rheynn ny dy chreck thalloo er ny chummal ayns ayrnyn neu-rheynnagh.

English: 5.— The Howstrake Estate Act, Amendment Act, 1931.
Manx: 5.— Yn Slattys Balley Howstrake Lhiasaghey, Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane Jeig as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to confirm agreements with reference to the Howstrake Estate.
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys shoh dy hickyraghey barganeyn bentyn rish yn Balley Howstrake.

English: 6.— The Motor Car (International Circulation) Act, 1931.
Manx: 6.— Yn Slattys Fainagh-Ooil (Coardail Eddyr Ashoonyn)  Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane Jeig as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to implement an international convention as to motor cars.
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys shoh dy chooilleeney coardail jeant eddyr ashoonyn bentyn rish fainee-ooil.

English: 7.— The Teare Divorce Act, 1931.
Manx: 7.— Yn Slattys Scarree Teare, Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane Jeig as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to dissolve the marriage between Thomas Gerard Mallandaine Teare and Ada Sage Wilson Teare
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys shoh dy eaysley yn voandey poosee eddyr Thomas Gerard Mallandaine Teare as Ada Sage Wilson Teare.

English: 8.— The Advertising Rate Act, 1931.
Manx: 8.— Yn Slattys Keesh-Hoilshee, Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane Jeig as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to amend the Advertising Rate Acts.
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lhiasaghey ny Slattysyn Keesh-Hoilshee.

English: 9.— The Local Government Amendment Act, 1931.
Manx: 9.— Yn Slattys Gurneilys Ynnydagh Lhiasaghey, Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane Jeig as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to extend the Local Government Acts throughout the Island.
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys shoh dy lheeadaghey ny Slattysyn Gurneilys Ynnydagh trooid-magh yn Ellan.

English: 10.— The Factories and Workshops (Amendment) Act, 1931.
Manx: 9.— Yn Slattys Thieyn Obbyr-Lauee as Shappyn Obbyr (Lhiasaghey), Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane Jeig as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to include quarries in the Factories and Workshops Act.
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys shoh dy ghoaill stiagh tuill-chlagh ayns yn Slattys Thieyn Obbyr-Lauee as Shappyn-Obbyr.

English: 11.— The Income Tax Amendment Act, 1931.
Manx: 11.— Yn Slattys Keesh Cosney-Vleanagh, Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane Jeig as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to tax incomes earned in this Island.
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys shoh dy hroggal keesh er cosney ta er ny hoilliu cheusthie jeh’n Ellan shoh.

English: 12.— The Forestry Act, 1931.
Manx: 12.— Yn Slattys Keylley, Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane Jeig as Feed.

English: The object of this Act is to establish a Forestry Board and promote afforestation.
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys shoh dy hoiaghey seose Boayrd Keylley as dy vishaghey cuirr biljin.

English: 13.— The Usury Amendment Act, 1931.
Manx: 13.— Yn SlattysThack Khiasaghey, Nuy Cheead Yeig Nane Jeig as Feed.

English: The object of the Act is to amend the Usury Act, 1931.
Manx: Ta’n aigney yn Slattys dy lhiasaghey yn Slattys Thack Shey Cheead Yeig Kiare as Nane jeig

English: The ROYAL ASSENT to the foregoing Acts was given on the dates set out hereunder:—
Manx: Va’n Chordail Reeoil currit gys ny Slattysyn goll roie er ny laghyn fo soit magh :—

English: No. 1 at Buckingham Palace ... 28th July, 1930.
Manx: Earroo 1 ec y Plaase Buckingham ... 28oo VII 1930.

English: Nos. 2 and 3, at Buckingham Palace ... 12th February, 1931.
Manx: Earroo 2 as 3 ec y Plaase Buckingham ... 12oo II 1931.

English: Nos.4 and 5, at Buckingham Palace ... 20th March, 1931.
Manx: Earroo 4 as 5 ec y Plaase Buckingham ... 20oo III 1931.

English: Nos. 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12 and 12 at Buckingham Palace ... 29th June, 1931.
Manx: Earroo 6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12 as 13 ec y Plaase Buckingham ... 29oo VI 1931.
